meta.purpose: Workflow and state machine for turning SEO topic databases into reviewed, fact-checked, internally linked, SEO-ready Markdown pages.

roles.content_planner: Selects topics, priority, route, and template.
roles.product_reviewer: Validates product capabilities and unsupported claims.
roles.technical_reviewer: Validates protocol, wiring, architecture, and factual claims.
roles.seo_reviewer: Checks search intent, metadata, internal links, headings, schema, and duplication.
roles.publisher: Creates or updates Markdown files and verifies build/prerender output.

exit_criteria: Page type is known.
Source database and source_id are recorded.
Recommended route and slug are confirmed.
Duplicate or cannibalizing topic is checked.
blocking_conditions: Topic overlaps another page without a clear differentiation.

exit_criteria: Protocol support is confirmed or marked unknown.
Connectivity support is confirmed or marked unknown.
IO and environmental claims are confirmed or removed.
Certification and compliance claims are either verified or excluded.
blocking_conditions: Page depends on a feature not supported by current products.
Case study requires real metrics that are unavailable.

exit_criteria: Primary keyword and search intent are defined.
Required sections are selected.
Minimum internal links are listed.
CTA and FAQ prompts are defined.
Claims to avoid are documented.
blocking_conditions: Required internal link targets are missing and not scheduled.

exit_criteria: Technical definitions are source-backed.
Protocol claims match factual source cards.
Product claims are separated from general facts.
Unsupported statements are removed or rewritten.
blocking_conditions: No source card exists for a core technical concept.
A high-risk claim cannot be verified.

exit_criteria: One H1 is defined.
H2 sections match the selected template.
FAQ section is planned.
Internal links have planned placements.
No section depends on unsupported claims.
blocking_conditions: Outline does not satisfy search intent.
Outline duplicates another page too closely.
Internal links are missing from key sections.

exit_criteria: Markdown draft exists in the correct content folder.
Frontmatter includes title, description, date, tags, and route fields where required.
All required internal links are included or documented as pending.
FAQ and CTA are included where appropriate.
blocking_conditions: Target content folder or route model is missing.
Draft includes unverified product or technical claims.
Required links point to pages that do not exist and are not scheduled.

exit_criteria: Title and meta description are unique.
Search intent is satisfied.
Headings are logical.
Internal link minimums are met.
Schema recommendation is documented.
No keyword stuffing or thin content.
blocking_conditions: Internal link requirements are not met.

exit_criteria: Protocol descriptions are accurate.
Architecture examples are plausible.
Product capability claims are verified.
Case metrics are real, anonymized, or conservative.
Safety, compliance, and certification claims are not overused.
blocking_conditions: Case study proof level is insufficient for publication.

exit_criteria: All review blockers are resolved.
Markdown frontmatter is valid.
Images, diagrams, or assets are present if referenced.
Required route is supported by frontend rendering or prerender pipeline.
Build succeeds.
Prerendered HTML exists for SEO-critical route where applicable.
Page is reachable locally or in staging.
Source database content_status is updated.
Roadmap progress is updated.

rules: Do not draft more than five pages before reviewing internal link coverage.
Start with product and solution pillars before long-tail pages.
Publish knowledge base pages early enough to support technical links.
Case studies require real or anonymized evidence before publication.

status_update_policy.when_brief_ready: Update the source topic record content_status to brief_ready if supported by that database.
status_update_policy.when_review_passed: Update content_status to ready_for_review or ready_to_publish.
status_update_policy.when_published: Update content_status to published and update docs/seo-roadmap.md.
status_update_policy.when_blocked: Set status to blocked and add a short blocker note.
